name: Charlotte Pudding
effect_text: [On Play] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 "Big Mom Pirates" type card with a cost of 2 or more and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.[Activate: Main] DON!! 1, You may rest this Character: Look at 1 card from the top of your opponent's deck.
